name: mcp-forge
description: Scaffold hardened MCP servers wrapping CLI tools
author: Matt Hesketh

commands.name: mcp-forge
commands.description: Generate a hardened MCP server from a CLI tool

commands.name: mcp-forge:audit
commands.description: Security audit an existing MCP server project

commands.name: mcp-forge:install
commands.description: Register a generated MCP server with Claude Code

commands.name: mcp-forge:eval
commands.description: Run benchmarks comparing plugin vs baseline generation

agents.name: cli-discoverer
agents.description: Discovers CLI tools and their subcommands

agents.name: scaffold-writer
agents.description: Generates MCP server project files from templates

agents.name: security-auditor
agents.description: Audits MCP server code for security vulnerabilities
